senses.gloss: elative degree of دَنِيء (danīʔ):; lower, meaner, viler; lowest, meanest, vilest
elative degree of دَنِيء (danīʔ):; more worthless; most worthless
elative degree of دَنِيء (danīʔ):; more cowardly; most cowardly

etymology.text: Elative of دَنِيء (danīʔ, “low, mean, vile; worthless; cowardly”).
